step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for the entire overhead botanical flat-lay scene — the warm cream linen-textured surface with its subtle weave, the deep-green monstera leaves arranged along the upper edge, the sage eucalyptus sprig draped diagonally across the lower-left, the dried rose stems with dusty-pink blooms at the upper-right corner, and the three graduated river stones along the right edge — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. The Alluvi product is now placed at the exact center of the composition on the cream linen surface, oriented horizontally with its long side parallel to the lower frame edge, front face directly up to the overhead camera, perfectly framed by the surrounding botanicals without any element crowding or overlapping the box. The product is approximately 7 inches wide and 3 inches tall, sized realistically relative to the monstera leaves, eucalyptus sprig, and river stones surrounding it. Do not enlarge the product beyond its actual proportions. No persona, no hands, no body parts in the frame — this is a pure overhead product flat-lay. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color — apply only the scene's directional lighting on top, do not tint the white. Match the lighting direction of the scene: bright soft natural daylight from above, even diffuse wash, very gentle shadows cast outward from the box just as they do from the surrounding botanicals.
